About Me

Hello! I'm Kareem, a Frontend Developer based in Cairo, Egypt, currently building real-time monitoring systems at EMS (Engineering Management Systems) — a Siemens-related infrastructure company.

I specialize in translating complex industrial data from PLCs and IoT sensors into intuitive, high-performance dashboards. My work spans sewage lifting stations, smart towers, warehouses, compounds, and malls — all running live in production.

Beyond the front end, I have hands-on experience with SCADA architecture, PLC tag mapping, DevOps pipelines, and backend services — giving me an end-to-end view of how industrial systems come together.

Here are some technologies I've been working with:

  • Next.js 15
  • Vue.js
  • TypeScript
  • React 19
  • ECharts / ECharts GL
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Cesium.js
  • PLC Tag Mapping
  • Node.js
  • SCADA/IoT Integration
  • Python / ML

Experience

2024 — Present
Frontend Developer
EMS — Engineering Management Systems · Cairo, Egypt
  • Designed and built 5+ live SCADA/IoT dashboards for Siemens-integrated industrial facilities including sewage stations, smart towers, warehouses, and compounds.
  • Developed real-time data visualizations consuming PLC tag streams — pump heatmaps, 3D scatter charts, flow trends, and KPI analytics using ECharts GL.
  • Built a Cesium.js 3D geospatial map for Cairo water infrastructure, integrating OpenStreetMap Nominatim search and real-time station status markers.
  • Implemented AI-generated flow and pressure predictions integrated into the operational dashboard UI.
  • Collaborated with engineers on PLC integration, IEC 61131-3 ladder diagram logic, and SCADA system architecture.

Investors-Ext · Siemens Infrastructure

Water Station SCADA Dashboard

Full-scale SCADA monitoring system for a sewage lifting station. Features a 3D isometric facility visualization, real-time pump heatmaps, water hammer monitoring with holographic tank rendering, AI-generated flow & pressure predictions, fault/trip analytics, and SDG-aligned KPI dashboards. Built for Siemens-integrated PLC infrastructure with voice command support.

Zia Mall · New Administrative Capital · Siemens
Mall BMS & IoT Monitoring

Complete BMS dashboard for a mall in Egypt's New Capital — data center monitoring, UPS systems, battery status, access control, CCTV with live feeds, internet connectivity stats, and passive infrastructure (fiber optic) monitoring.

React TypeScript BMS Siemens New Capital
🌍
EMS Internal · Open Source
Cesium.js 3D Station Map

Interactive 3D geospatial map of Cairo's water infrastructure network. Built on Cesium.js with CartoDB Dark Matter tiles, real-time station status markers, Cairo-bounded OSM Nominatim search, and conditional navigation to individual station dashboards.

Cesium.js Next.js OpenStreetMap 3D Mapping
📊
Construction Tech · ML-Powered
BOQ Processing Platform

Automated Bill of Quantities processor in Python/Flask. Supports PDF, CSV, and Excel inputs with Arabic text detection, Google Translate integration, ML-based CSI MasterFormat classification (TF-IDF + logistic regression) achieving 100% match rate.
